name: 1.3" SH1106 I2C OLED Module (128x64)
description: Common 1.3 inch 128x64 OLED display module with SH1106 controller, I2C 4-pin header (GND VCC SCL SDA - note order differs from 0.96" module!), 35.4x33.5mm board, four 3.0mm mounting holes. Dimensions per LCDwiki vendor drawing - verify against your specific module.
dimensions_source: LCDwiki MC130VX size drawing: board 35.4x33.5, holes D3.0/pad 4.5 (x +/-15.2; y top -14.75/bottom +13.75 - drawing has a 0.5mm chain conflict, arithmetically exact chain adopted), 4-pin 2.54 header, active area 29.42x14.7.
